parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: $json.business_id, messages_sent: 1, tokens_in: $json.input_tokens, tokens_out: $json.output_tokens, cost_egp_total: $json.cost_egp, period_start: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,7) + '-01', last_message_at: $json.timestamp }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ p_business_id: $json.business_id, p_messages_delta: 1, p_tokens_in_delta: $json.input_tokens, p_tokens_out_delta: $json.output_tokens, p_cost_egp_delta: $json.cost_egp }) }}

meta.description: Calculates AI cost (Haiku $1/$5, Sonnet $3/$15 per 1M tokens, ×49 EGP). Reads quota from Supabase usage_counters, calls increment_usage RPC. Replaces Airtable Customer_Quota table.
